Fang Wang, Ph.D Associate Teaching Professor Engineering and Information Technology Laﬀerre Hall E2437H | COLUMBIA MO 65211 O: 5738848747 | E: wangfan@missouri.edu University of Missouri

From: Franken, Olivia (MU-Student) <okf2wm@missouri.edu> Sent: Wednesday, February 12, 2025 3:50 PM To: Almasri, Mahmoud <almasrim@missouri.edu>; Wang, Fang <wangfan@missouri.edu>; Almalaysha, Mohammed (MU-Student) <maaﬀn@missouri.edu>; White, Caleb (MU-Student) <ccwkkw@missouri.edu> Subject: Spin Coater References

Before I begin the retopology process with the existing spin coater model, I wanted to know if anyone had any reference photos, product links, or model numbers for it.

Thank you,
